news-korea-econ.title: Trump in White House Address: Classified Documents Show Election Interference from China, Major Election Vulnerabilities
news-korea-econ.description:
President Donald Trump on Thursday unveiled a bombshell tranche of files he emphasized detail China's interference in American elections, particularly in 2020, as well as major election vulnerabilities.

news-korea-econ.title: New York Times Praises Wikipedia Owner’s Obama Stooge CEO, Smears Site Critics
news-korea-econ.description: The New York Times has published a piece about Bernadette Meehan, who this year became CEO of the Wikimedia Foundation, which owns Wikipedia. The article praised Meehan’s background in diplomacy, serving primarily during the Obama and Biden administrations, a…

news-global-econ.title: AI Executives Fear Rising Threat of Violence, Invest in Armed Security
news-global-econ.description:
Violent threats and security incidents aimed at AI companies and their leadership have surged dramatically in recent months, prompting major investments in executive protection and armed security.

news-global-econ.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Scrubs Starship Test Flight Due to Engine Ignition Failure
news-global-econ.description:
Elon Musk's SpaceX aborted a planned test flight of its Starship rocket Thursday when several of the Super Heavy booster's engines failed to ignite during the final countdown sequence at the company's South Texas launch facility.

news-global-econ.title: 1,740-year-old Roman coin bearing emperor's name found as England rail dig reveals clues
news-global-econ.description: A rare Roman coin bearing the name of Emperor Carausius was found alongside evidence of an ancient settlement during East West Rail excavations.

news-global-econ.title: California county approves reparations plan as neighboring school district 'Black Thriving' effort stalls
news-global-econ.description: Alameda County approved a sweeping reparations plan focused on housing and criminal justice reform as Oakland Unified faces criticism for stalled promises.

news-global-econ.title: Maine Democrats recycle Platner's far-left talking points in scramble to replace disgraced ex-nominee
news-global-econ.description: Four Democrats vying to replace Graham Platner in the Maine Senate race echoed his stances on abolishing ICE, Gaza genocide, and healthcare.

news-korea-soc.description: President Donald Trump has called on the Department of Justice (DOJ) to investigate alleged voter fraud in Michigan during the 2020 election, revealing during his Thursday night address that the FBI uncovered criminal activity in a probe that was "killed" by …

news-global-soc.title: Every controversy surrounding Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' from casting to costumes
news-global-soc.description: Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" faces casting debates, historical accuracy criticism, and dialogue backlash, but experts say buzz may boost box office.

news-global-soc.title: Gas Prices Will Stay Higher for Longer, Even if Oil Falls
news-global-soc.description: Refining capacity is strained, and fuel markets don’t have much of a buffer.

news-global-soc.title: India visa services disrupted in Australia, Singapore after tender dispute
news-global-soc.description: India's visa services face disruptions in Australia and Singapore after a court ordered fresh bidding due to evaluation flaws.

news-global-soc.title: I've studied military strategy. Trump now faces Iran's oldest battlefield trick
news-global-soc.description: Iran's strategy targets the Strait of Hormuz and Bab el-Mandeb to widen the board, betting that each U.S. strike multiplies Washington's burdens.

news-global-soc.title: Manipal Hospitals said to cut valuation to $8.3 billion in IPO
news-global-soc.description: The Temasek Holdings-backed company is planning to raise as much as ₹11,000 crore through a share sale that’s likely to be launched in the week starting July 27
